aljazeera.title: US-Iran escalation threatens oil supply recovery, warns IEA

monitor_the_situation.title: US Expands Airstrikes Across Southern Iran After Ceasefire Collapses
US Strikes Over 170 Iranian Targets, Kills 14 in Two-Day Campaign

— S4 · Conflict · Iran · 3d ago. The US hit over 170 Iranian military targets across two nights, killing 14 and injuring 78. Trump ended the ceasefire, and CENTCOM targeted air defense, missile sites, and coastal radar.
Israeli Drone Strike Hits Gaza Hospital Courtyard
— S3 · Conflict · Beit Lahia, Gaza Strip, Palestine · 16m ago. Israeli drone strikes Kamal Adwan Hospital courtyard in northern Gaza, wounding several Palestinians, according to medical sources.
Man Sentenced to Death in UAE for Murder of Mother and Two Daughters
